steps.title: Fit the table
steps.content: The table includes $(0,18)$ and $(1,13)$. Since $x=0$ gives the $y$-intercept, $b=18$. The slope from these two points is $$m=\frac{13-18}{1-0}=-5.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is $y=-5x+18$. It checks against the table because when $x=0$, $y=18$, and when $x=1$, $y=13$. Choice D is correct.
